variants.name: 幻术师
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：说书人可以更改其提交的咒语中的一个词，你会得知更改前和更改后的词。
variants.firstNightReminder: Ask the Illusionist to choose a player. Change one word of that player's Spell, then tell the Illuionist what the word used to be and what the word is now.
variants.otherNightReminder: Ask the Illusionist to choose a player. Change one word of that player's Spell, then tell the Illuionist what the word used to be and what the word is now.
